metadata.description: Official Knowledge Base for Thorx AI Support Assistant - AI-Powered Digital Engagement Platform

en: Hello {name}! Welcome to THORX — the AI-Powered Digital Engagement Platform. I'm your AI assistant. Ask me about how to earn, the referral matrix, wallet fees, or anything else about the platform!
Hi {name}! Welcome to THORX. I can help you understand Engine A (Attention Marketplace), Engine B (CPA Offers), the 3-Division Referral Matrix, or wallet deductions. What would you like to know?
Greetings {name}! I'm here to support your THORX journey. Ask me about earnings, the AI Attention Detector, withdrawal fees, or how to climb the ranks!
ur: Assalam o Alaikum {name}! THORX mein khushamdeed — AI-Powered Digital Engagement Platform. Main aapka AI assistant hoon. Engine A, Engine B, referral matrix ya wallet fees ke baare mein poochein!
Hello {name}! THORX community mein swagat hai. Main aapko Engine A (video ads), Engine B (CPA offers) aur 3-tier referral system ke baare mein bata sakta hoon. Kya jaanna chahenge?
Salam {name}! Main THORX par aapki earning journey mein madad ke liye hoon. Earning, AI Attention Detector, withdrawal fees ya rank ke baare mein befikr poochein!

en: Goodbye {name}! Thank you for being part of the THORX ecosystem. Stay attentive and keep earning — real attention brings real rewards!
Take care {name}! I'm available 24/7 for any questions. See you next time!
Bye {name}! Wishing you success on THORX. Remember: What You See Is What You Get. Allah Hafiz!
ur: Allah Hafiz {name}! THORX ecosystem ka hissa banne ka shukriya. Tawajjo rakhein aur kamate rahein!
Apna khayal rakhein {name}! Main 24/7 available hoon agar koi sawal ho. Phir milenge!
Khuda Hafiz {name}! THORX par kamyabi ki dua. Yaad rakhein: Jo dikhta hai wahi milta hai. Allah Hafiz!

en: THORX is an AI-Powered Digital Engagement Platform that connects businesses with verified human attention while enabling users to earn real money. We operate three core engines: Engine A (Attention Marketplace), Engine B (AI-Driven CPA Offers), and Engine C (3-Division Referral Matrix). Payouts go directly to JazzCash and EasyPaisa.

{name}, THORX is built around one idea: turning genuine human attention into currency. Unlike other platforms, every ad view is verified by our hidden AI Attention Detector — tracking tab visibility, cursor movement, and scroll behavior. No fake traffic, no bots, no passive clicking. Real attention = real money.

THORX is where verified attention meets opportunity. Advertisers get real human engagement (not bot impressions). Users get transparent, Net-First earnings in PKR — what you see in your wallet is exactly what you receive. We also feature a 3-tier referral system that pays 15% / 7.5% commissions triggered at withdrawal.
ur: THORX ek AI-Powered Digital Engagement Platform hai jo businesses ko verified human attention se connect karta hai. Teen engines hain: Engine A (Attention Marketplace), Engine B (CPA Offers), Engine C (3-Division Referral Matrix). Payouts JazzCash aur EasyPaisa par jaate hain.

{name}, THORX ka maqsad hai asli human attention ko paison mein tabdeel karna. Hamesha AI Attention Detector se verify hota hai — tab visibility, cursor movement aur scroll behavior track karta hai. Koi fake traffic nahi, koi bot nahi. Asli tawajjo = asli paisa.

THORX mein asli mauqa milta hai. Advertisers ko real human engagement milti hai. Users ko Net-First earnings milti hai PKR mein — jo wallet mein dikhta hai wahi milta hai. 3-tier referral system bhi hai jo 15% / 7.5% deta hai jab referral withdraw kare.

en: Yes, {name}, THORX operates a strict **Halal-based earning model**. All video ads and CPA offers are content-filtered — no haram or inappropriate material is promoted. Earnings come from genuine work (verified human attention and engagement), not interest or gambling.

We take Halal compliance seriously. Income is generated through active, real user engagement inside our AI sandbox — not passive clicking or bots. Genuine attention is the exchange of value that makes earning legitimate and halal.
ur: Ji haan {name}, THORX ek **Halal-based earning model** par chalta hai. Tamam video ads aur CPA offers content filter se guzarte hain — koi haram ya namunasib mawad promote nahi hota. Aamdani asli kaam (verified human attention) se aati hai, sood ya juway se nahi.
Hum Halal compliance ko sanjeedgi se lete hain. Kamai active, real user engagement se hoti hai AI sandbox mein — passive clicking ya bots se nahi. Asli tawajjo hi kamai ko jaiz banati hai.

en:
THORX has three earning streams, {name}:
1. **Engine A (Attention Marketplace)**: Watch a 15–25 second video ad, then actively explore the advertiser's page inside our secure AI sandbox for 15 seconds. The hidden AI Attention Detector verifies your engagement before crediting your wallet.
2. **Engine B (CPA Offers)**: Complete curated tasks from top CPA networks — app downloads, reviews, registrations. Submit proof and our AI Agent verifies it through a 3-tier fraud check.
3. **Engine C (Referral Matrix)**: Earn 15% when your Level 1 referral withdraws, and 7.5% when their referrals withdraw.

Go to the Work section to start earning. Engine A = watch video ads + explore pages for 15 seconds. Engine B = complete CPA tasks and upload proof for AI verification. Engine C = invite friends and earn commissions at their withdrawal. All earnings appear in your Net-First wallet — showing exactly what you can withdraw.
ur:
THORX mein teen tareeqay hain, {name}:
1. **Engine A**: 15–25 second video ad dekhein, phir AI sandbox mein 15 seconds tak advertiser ka page explore karein. AI Attention Detector verify karta hai.
2. **Engine B**: Top CPA networks ke curated tasks karein — app download, review, registration. Proof submit karein aur AI Agent 3-tier check karta hai.
3. **Engine C**: Level 1 referral ke withdrawal par 15% aur unke referral ke withdrawal par 7.5% milta hai.

Work section mein jayen earning shuru karne ke liye. Engine A = video ads + 15 second page exploration. Engine B = CPA tasks + proof upload. Engine C = doston ko invite karein aur unke withdrawal par commission payen. Sab kuch Net-First wallet mein dikhta hai — jo dikhta hai wahi milta hai.

en:
**Engine A — The Attention Marketplace** runs in two phases:
**Phase 1 (Video Player)**: Watch a 15–25 second video ad served through our Waterfall Video Player. If one ad network is empty, the next loads instantly — zero downtime, maximum fill rates.
**Phase 2 (AI Sandbox)**: The advertiser's landing page loads inside a secure Thorx sandbox. You must actively explore it for 15 seconds. A hidden AI behavioral tracker monitors tab visibility, cursor/touch movement, and scroll depth. Pass all three signals = wallet credited. Fail = no payout.
ur:
**Engine A — Attention Marketplace** do phases mein kaam karta hai:
**Phase 1 (Video Player)**: Hamara Waterfall Video Player 15–25 second ka video ad serve karta hai. Agar ek network khali ho toh dusra fauran load hota hai — zero downtime.
**Phase 2 (AI Sandbox)**: Advertiser ka landing page secure Thorx sandbox mein khulta hai. 15 seconds tak active explore karna zaroori hai. Hidden AI tracker tab visibility, cursor/touch movement aur scroll depth check karta hai. Teeno pass = wallet credit. Fail = koi payout nahi.

en:
**Engine B — AI-Driven CPA Offers** is the high-yield task system. The THORX team curates reliable offers from top CPA networks — app downloads, social media reviews, registrations.

After completing a task, upload your screenshot/video proof. Our AI Agent runs a **3-tier fraud check**:
• Tier 1: Metadata & hash extraction — catches duplicate or recycled proofs
• Tier 2: OCR + LLM analysis — verifies target handles and screenshot content
• Tier 3: Approved tasks enter 'Pending' escrow before admin final wallet release
ur:
**Engine B — AI-Driven CPA Offers** high-yield task system hai. THORX team top CPA networks se reliable offers curate karti hai — app download, social media reviews, registrations.

Task complete karne ke baad proof upload karein. AI Agent **3-tier fraud check** karta hai:
• Tier 1: Metadata & hash — duplicate ya recycled proof pakarta hai
• Tier 2: OCR + LLM — screenshot content verify karta hai
• Tier 3: Approved tasks 'Pending' escrow mein jate hain admin final release se pehle

en:
**The THORX AI Attention Detector** is our core verification system. When you complete an ad task, a hidden script tracks three behavioral signals simultaneously:
• **Tab Visibility API**: Instantly pauses the countdown if you switch tabs or minimize the window
• **Micro-Movement Delta**: Detects cursor (x,y) coordinates or touch input — confirms the device is being actively used
• **Scroll Vector**: Verifies you've scrolled at least 10–20% of the viewport height, proving active reading

All three must pass for the payout to be credited. The user only sees a minimalist countdown timer — all tracking is invisible.
ur:
**THORX AI Attention Detector** hamara core verification system hai. Jab aap ad task complete karte hain, ek hidden script teen behavioral signals track karta hai:
• **Tab Visibility API**: Agar tab switch karein ya window minimize karein toh timer fauran rukta hai
• **Micro-Movement Delta**: Cursor ya touch input detect karta hai — confirm karta hai device active use ho rahi hai
• **Scroll Vector**: Verify karta hai ke aap ne kam az kam 10–20% page scroll kiya — asli reading ka saboot

Teeno pass hone chahiye payout credit hone ke liye. User sirf minimalist countdown timer dekhta hai — sab tracking invisible hai.

en:
THORX uses the **3-Division Referral Matrix** spanning three tiers:
• **Level 1**: When User B (your direct referral) withdraws → you receive 15% of their gross earnings
• **Level 2**: When User C (User B's referral) withdraws → you receive 7.5% and User B receives 15%
• **Solo Loop**: Users who join without a referral link pay a flat 15% Admin Charge at withdrawal (no referrer to distribute to)

**Important**: Commissions are deducted from the withdrawing user's gross earnings — not added as a platform bonus. Triggered by payout requests, not earnings.

Your referral commissions are part of the withdrawal deduction, {name}. When your referral withdraws, 15% goes to you (Level 1). When their referral withdraws, 7.5% goes to you and 15% goes to your referral (Level 2). Find your unique referral link in the Referral section of your User Portal.
ur:
THORX **3-Division Referral Matrix** 3 tiers mein kaam karta hai:
• **Level 1**: Jab User B (aapka direct referral) withdraw kare → aapko unki gross earnings ka 15% milta hai
• **Level 2**: Jab User C (User B ka referral) withdraw kare → aapko 7.5% aur User B ko 15% milta hai
• **Solo Loop**: Bina referral link ke join karne walon ko withdrawal par flat 15% Admin Charge lagti hai

**Zaroori**: Commissions withdrawing user ki gross earnings se kati hain — platform ki taraf se extra bonus nahi. Payout request par trigger hoti hai, earning par nahi.

Aapki referral commissions withdrawal deduction ka hissa hain, {name}. Jab aapka referral withdraw kare, 15% aapko milta hai. Jab unka referral withdraw kare, 7.5% aapko aur 15% unhe milta hai. Referral link User Portal ke Referral section mein milega.

en:
THORX uses a **Net-First UI** — your wallet always displays your exact withdrawable amount after all deductions are silently calculated in the background. What you see is exactly what you receive.

**Deduction breakdown at withdrawal:**
• Platform Fee: 12% flat (all users, for system maintenance)
• Referred Users: additional 15% (Level 1 commission) + 7.5% (Level 2 commission) = **34.5% total**
• Solo/Organic Users (no referral link): additional 15% Admin Charge = **27% total**

These cuts are already reflected in your displayed balance — no surprise deductions at checkout.

Here's the simple breakdown, {name}:
• If you were referred by someone: 34.5% total deducted (12% platform + 22.5% referral network)
• If you joined organically (no referral): 27% total deducted (12% platform + 15% admin)

Your wallet balance already reflects these deductions. There are no hidden fees beyond what's displayed.
ur:
THORX **Net-First UI** use karta hai — aapka wallet hamesha exact withdrawable amount dikhata hai, tamam deductions pehle se calculate ho chuki hoti hain. Jo dikhta hai wahi milta hai.

**Withdrawal par deductions:**
• Platform Fee: 12% flat (sabke liye, system maintenance)
• Referred Users: additional 15% (Level 1) + 7.5% (Level 2) = **kul 34.5%**
• Solo/Organic Users (bina referral): additional 15% Admin Charge = **kul 27%**

Yeh cuts already aapke displayed balance mein reflect hoti hain — checkout par koi surprise nahi.

Simple breakdown, {name}:
• Agar kisi ne refer kiya: kul 34.5% kata (12% platform + 22.5% referral network)
• Organically join kiya (bina referral): kul 27% kata (12% platform + 15% admin)

Wallet balance already in deductions ko reflect karta hai. Display se zyada koi hidden fees nahi.

en: **LeadX** is THORX's proprietary lead generation system for advertisers. It combines Engine A's verified attention infrastructure and Engine B's CPA offer system to deliver real, qualified leads — not just impressions or clicks. Advertisers can opt into LeadX for best results or launch their own direct campaigns through the Advertiser Portal. LeadX is what separates THORX from traditional ad platforms.
ur: **LeadX** THORX ka proprietary lead generation system hai advertisers ke liye. Yeh Engine A ki verified attention aur Engine B ki CPA offer infrastructure ko combine karta hai — real, qualified leads deliver karta hai, sirf impressions nahi. Advertisers LeadX use kar sakte hain ya directly Advertiser Portal se apni campaigns launch kar sakte hain.

en: Daily Tasks are your **Payout Gatekeeper**, {name}. Your payout page is mathematically LOCKED until your assigned Daily Mandatory Tasks are complete. These tasks ensure consistent platform engagement and typically include Engine A ad views and Engine B offer completions. Complete your tasks first — then unlock the withdrawal page.
ur: Daily Tasks aapka **Payout Gatekeeper** hain, {name}. Jab tak aaj kay Mandatory Tasks poore nahi karte, aapka withdrawal page mathematically LOCKED rehta hai. In tasks mein Engine A ke ad views aur Engine B ke offer completions shamil hote hain. Pehle tasks poore karein — phir withdrawal page unlock hoga.

en:
THORX uses a **Dual-Requirement Ranking System**. You must meet BOTH referral AND personal earnings thresholds to upgrade. Higher ranks unlock faster withdrawal priorities:

1. **Nawa Aya**: New user — Priority 5
2. **Munna**: 5 referrals + 2,500 PKR earned — Priority 4
3. **Bawa Ji**: 10 referrals + 5,000 PKR earned — Priority 3
4. **Haji Saab**: 15 referrals + 10,000 PKR earned — Priority 2
5. **Chacha Supreme**: 25 referrals + 25,000 PKR earned — Priority 1 (fastest payouts)

Both conditions must be met simultaneously — you cannot upgrade on referrals or earnings alone.
ur:
THORX ka **Dual-Requirement Ranking System** fake referrals rokta hai. Rank barhane ke liye referrals AUR earnings donon zaroori hain:

1. **Nawa Aya**: Naya user — Priority 5
2. **Munna**: 5 referrals + 2,500 PKR — Priority 4
3. **Bawa Ji**: 10 referrals + 5,000 PKR — Priority 3
4. **Haji Saab**: 15 referrals + 10,000 PKR — Priority 2
5. **Chacha Supreme**: 25 referrals + 25,000 PKR — Priority 1 (sab se tez withdrawals)

Dono conditions ek saath poori karni hain — sirf referrals ya sirf earnings se upgrade nahi hoga.

en:
Withdrawals go directly to **JazzCash** or **EasyPaisa**. Before you can withdraw:
1. Complete your daily mandatory tasks (the payout page is locked until tasks are done)
2. Meet your rank's withdrawal requirements

Higher-ranking users (Chacha Supreme, Haji Saab) have payouts processed first. Your wallet balance already reflects all deductions — what you see is exactly what arrives in your account.

Go to the **Payout section** in your User Portal to request a withdrawal. Funds are sent to JazzCash or EasyPaisa. The 12% platform fee plus any referral/admin charges are already calculated in your displayed balance — no surprise cuts at checkout.
ur:
Withdrawal seedha **JazzCash** ya **EasyPaisa** par jaata hai. Withdraw karne se pehle:
1. Daily mandatory tasks poore karein (tasks se pehle payout page LOCKED hai)
2. Apne rank ki withdrawal requirements meet karein

Uonche rank waale (Chacha Supreme, Haji Saab) ki payment pehle process hoti hai. Wallet balance mein sab deductions already calculate hain — jo dikhta hai wahi account mein aata hai.

User Portal ke **Payout section** mein jayen withdrawal request karne ke liye. JazzCash ya EasyPaisa par paisa jaata hai. 12% platform fee aur referral/admin charges pehle se balance mein reflect hain — checkout par koi surprise nahi.

en: **Warning**: Auto-functioning bots or scripts are strictly banned on THORX. Our hidden AI Attention Detector tracks real behavioral signals — cursor movement, scroll depth, and tab visibility — and will automatically fail any bot attempt. Using bots results in a permanent shadow-ban from CPA offers and loss of pending earnings.
ur: **Warning**: Auto-functioning bots aur scripts THORX par strictly mana hain. Hamara hidden AI Attention Detector real behavioral signals track karta hai — cursor movement, scroll depth, tab visibility — aur koi bhi bot attempt automatically fail ho jaayegi. Bot use karne par CPA offers se permanent shadow-ban aur pending earnings ka nuqsan hoga.

en: THORX detects ad-blockers automatically. If you're using an ad-blocker or an ad-blocking browser like Brave, a **Gateway Block modal** will prevent access to the earning area. You must whitelist THORX in your ad-blocker to proceed. Ad delivery is the core mechanism behind your earnings — blocking ads means the earning loop cannot function.
ur: THORX automatically ad-blockers detect karta hai. Agar aap ad-blocker ya ad-blocking browser jaise Brave use kar rahe hain, ek **Gateway Block modal** earning area ka access rok dega. THORX ko apne ad-blocker mein whitelist karna zaroori hai. Ad delivery earning ka core mechanism hai — ads block karne se earning loop kaam nahi karta.

en: THORX is built with security at every layer, {name}. We use secure authentication, encrypted data handling, and multi-layer AI fraud prevention on every interaction. The platform is web-first by design — no app download needed — which allows us to deploy immediate security patches and hot-fixes without app store delays.
ur: THORX har layer par security ke saath bana hai, {name}. Secure authentication, encrypted data handling, aur multi-layer AI fraud prevention use hoti hai har interaction par. Platform web-first hai — koi app download zaroori nahi — jo hamen immediate security patches deploy karne ki ijazat deta hai app store delays ke bina.

en: I didn't quite catch that, {name}. I can help with earnings, Engine A (Attention Marketplace), Engine B (CPA Offers), referral commissions, wallet fees, or withdrawal. What would you like to know?
I'm not sure about that, but THORX is all about turning real human attention into currency. Ask me about 'how to earn', 'referral commissions', 'withdrawal fees', or 'how ranks work'!
ur: Maine sahi se samjha nahi, {name}. Main Engine A, Engine B, referral commissions, wallet fees ya withdrawal mein madad kar sakta hoon. Kya jaanna chahenge?
Mujhe yakeen nahi, lekin THORX asli human attention ko currency mein tabdeel karta hai. Mujhse 'kaise kamaon', 'referral commission', 'withdrawal fees' ya 'rank system' ke baare mein poochein!
